title: Alfred the Great becomes King of Wessex
fact: Alfred the Great was King of the West Saxons from 871 to 886, and King of the Anglo-Saxons from 886 until his death in 899.

title: Ecgberht becomes King of Wessex
fact: Ecgberht, also spelled Egbert, Ecgbert, Ecgbriht, Ecgbeorht, and Ecbert, was King of Wessex from 802 until his death in 839.

title: Æthelwulf becomes King of Wessex
fact: Æthelwulf was King of Wessex from 839 to 858.

title: Æthelberht becomes King of Wessex
fact: Æthelberht was the King of Wessex from 860 until his death in 865.

title: Cerdic of Wessex becomes King of Wessex
fact: Cerdic is described in the Anglo-Saxon Chronicle as a leader of the Anglo-Saxon settlement of Britain, being the founder and first king of Wessex, reigning from around 519 to 534 AD.

title: Æthelbald becomes King of Wessex
fact: Æthelbald was King of Wessex from 855 or 858 to 860.

title: Ine becomes King of Wessex
fact: Ine or Ini was King of Wessex from 689 to 726.

title: Æthelred I becomes King of Wessex
fact: Æthelred I was King of Wessex from 865 until his death in 871.

title: Penda of Mercia becomes King of Wessex
fact: Penda was a 7th-century king of Mercia, the Anglo-Saxon kingdom in what is today the Midlands.

title: Cædwalla of Wessex becomes King of Wessex
fact: Cædwalla was the King of Wessex from approximately 685 until he abdicated in 688.

title: Cuthred becomes King of Wessex
fact: Cuthred or Cuþræd was the King of Wessex from 740 until 756.

title: Cynegils becomes King of Wessex
fact: Cynegils was King of Wessex from c. 611 to c.

title: Ceawlin of Wessex becomes King of Wessex
fact: Ceawlin was a King of Wessex.

title: Beorhtric becomes King of Wessex
fact: Beorhtric was the King of Wessex from 786 to 802, succeeding Cynewulf.
